_note: This is for the Supabase Management API OAuth2 flow, which grants access to manage Supabase projects on behalf of a user. Confidential clients authenticate via HTTP Basic header (base64 client_id:client_secret). Public clients send only client_id in the request body. Separately, Supabase Auth (per-project) can act as an OAuth 2.1 / OIDC server for end-user authentication at https://{project_ref}.supabase.co, but that is a different system.

_supabase_auth_per_project._note: Per-project Supabase Auth OAuth 2.1 server (public beta as of Nov 2025). This makes YOUR app an OAuth provider using Supabase Auth.
